title: Wind Fix
description: A simple mod that makes wind charges and wind burst unaffected by explosion knockback resistance, like blast protection
body:
# Wind Fix
A simple mod that makes wind charges and wind burst unaffected by explosion knockback resistance, like blast protection.

This mod allows wind-based explosions to bypass the explosion knocback resistance provided by netherite armor, and armor enchanted with blast protection. This includes:
- Wind charges thrown by the player/dispenser
- Wind charges shot by Breeze
- Wind burst from Maces
- Wind burst created by the Wind Charging potions
